title: ernodea millspaughii
intro: Ernodea millspaughii, also known as the Coral Honeysuckle Vine, is a type of flowering vine native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Ernodea millspaughii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ernodea millspaughii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
